name: quote
prompt:
Analyze this quote/ticker display. Extract the visible market data.

Return a JSON object with this exact structure:
{
  "symbol": "detected symbol or null",
  "displayType": "quote_panel",
  "bid": 671.27,
  "ask": 671.30,
  "last": 671.28,
  "volume": 1234567,
  "change": -0.42,
  "changePercent": -0.06,
  "confidence": "high|medium|low",
  "notes": "any observations"
}

Rules:
- Extract exact values as displayed
- Set any non-visible field to null
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text
